name: Rhode
author: Luis Bolaños Mures (2016) / AGP port
description: Drawless square-board connection game (Bolaños Mures, 2016). Connect your two edges with an orthogonal chain. Diagonal links must be consolidated and it costs a whole turn: whenever you have a weak pair (a diagonal pair of your stones with no friendly stone adjacent to both), you must fill a point adjacent to both — and after every placement your other stones caught in crosscuts are removed.
